_comment: Featured placements carousel — rotates at the top of the journal pages. These are CURATED slides (paid placements, sponsor takeovers, in-house promos) — NOT programmatic ad units. Each slide is one entry below. A slide can be (a) image-only (pre-composed creative, no overlay text needed) or (b) image + structured overlay (eyebrow/title/subtitle/CTA rendered on top). Set active:false to pause without deleting. Order in this array = display order.

schema.advertiser: shown above the creative as 'Sponsored · X'
schema.image: background image URL — recommended 1920x320 jpg/webp, or a pre-composed full creative
schema.url: click-through destination for the whole slide
schema.eyebrow: small label above title (optional, gold accent)
schema.title: headline shown over the image (optional — omit for image-only slides)
schema.subtitle: supporting line below title (optional)
schema.ctaLabel: button label (optional — defaults to 'Learn More' if ctaUrl present)
schema.ctaUrl: if different from `url`, sets a dedicated CTA button click target
schema.textAlign: left | right (where the overlay text sits — default left)
placements: page slugs the slide is eligible on, or ['all']
